mapper.select: SELECT MENU_ID, MENU_NAME, MENU_SEQ FROM MENUS ORDER BY MENU_SEQ ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MENUS( MENU_id, MENU_NAME, MENU_SEQ ) VALUES( #{ menu_id }, #{ menu_name }, #{ menu_seq } )

INSERT INTO MENUS ( MENU_ID, MENU_NAME, MENU_SEQ ) VALUES ( ( SELECT 'MENU' || TO_CHAR(NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(MENU_ID, 5))), 0) + 1, 'FM00') FROM MENUS ), #{menu_name}, (SELECT NVL(MAX(MENU_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM MENUS) )
